vocab.example: Football is more than just a game here; it is a full-blown cultural phenomenon that brings the entire nation to a standstill.

vocab.meaning: trò tiêu khiển/môn thể thao quốc dân
vocab.example: While basketball is growing, football remains the undisputed national pastime in my country.

vocab.meaning: niềm đam mê sâu sắc/ăn sâu bám rễ
vocab.example: People in my hometown have a deep-seated passion for volleyball, often playing in local parks until dusk.

vocab.meaning: thúc đẩy sự gắn kết xã hội
vocab.example: Team sports are highly valued because they foster social cohesion and bridge the gap between different generations.

vocab.meaning: những người ủng hộ cuồng nhiệt
vocab.example: Local clubs boast legions of ardent supporters who never miss a single match, regardless of the weather.
The communal spirit is palpable in stadiums, where thousands of strangers unite to cheer for their favorite team.
The popularity of team sports is evident at the grassroots level, with nearly every school having its own dedicated team.
The values of cooperation and collective effort are deeply ingrained in our society through competitive team sports.

vocab.meaning: lượng người theo dõi cuồng nhiệt
vocab.example: The national basketball league has a fanatical following, with jerseys and merchandise sold on every street corner.

vocab.meaning: vượt qua các ranh giới xã hội
vocab.example: Team sports have a unique ability to transcend social boundaries, uniting people from all walks of life under one banner.
